AEMEATHWW-FOLDED_ROUTE_SECTION.title: Folded Route Laboratory
AEMEATHWW-FORCE_FOLDED_ROUTE_EVENT_ON_AC: When enabled, if the run includes Aemeath, the next ? room event in Act 1 is forcibly replaced with Folded Route Laboratory. When disabled, this event only appears normally as a random Act 2 event.
AEMEATHWW-FORCED_BOSS_SECTION.title: Forced Boss Selection (Test Only)
AEMEATHWW-FORCED_BOSS_ON_ACT1.title: Force Act 1 Boss
AEMEATHWW-FORCED_BOSS_ON_ACT1.hover.desc: When set, Act 1 boss is fixed to this option. Choose Default to keep vanilla selection. For testing only; do not change this option unless you know what you are doing.
AEMEATHWW-FORCED_BOSS_ON_ACT2.title: Force Act 2 Boss
AEMEATHWW-FORCED_BOSS_ON_ACT2.hover.desc: When set, Act 2 boss is fixed to this option. Haivixia is available here as an Act 2 boss option. For testing only; do not change this option unless you know what you are doing.
AEMEATHWW-FORCED_BOSS_ON_ACT3.title: Force Act 3 Boss
AEMEATHWW-FORCED_BOSS_ON_ACT3.hover.desc: When set, Act 3 boss is fixed to this option. Choose Default to keep vanilla selection. For testing only; do not change this option unless you know what you are doing.
AEMEATHWW-BOSS_ENABLE_SECTION.title: Aemeath Bosses
AEMEATHWW-ENABLE_AEMEATH_BOSSES.title: Enable Aemeath bosses in combat
AEMEATHWW-ENABLE_AEMEATH_BOSSES.hover.de: When enabled, Aemeath custom bosses (Insatiable Mk2, Sigillum, Haivixia, Nameless Explorer) may appear in combat as normal. Disable this if you only want to face vanilla bosses.
